hInfo.name: Royce Youth Hostel
hInfo.des: {"spoken_languages":"English","rooms":"Make yourself at home in one of the 5 guestrooms featuring microwaves. Prepare your meals in the shared/communal kitchen. Complimentary wired and wireless internet access is available. Bathrooms have shower/tub combinations and slippers.","onsite_payments":"Debit cards not accepted, Cash","dining":"Grab a bite to eat at one of the hotel's many dining establishments, which include 2 restaurants and 2 coffee shops/cafes. Mingle with other guests at the complimentary reception, held daily.","business_amenities":"Featured amenities include a 24-hour front desk and coffee/tea in a common area.","location":"With a stay at Royce Youth Hostel , you'll be centrally located in Sharjah, within a 15-minute drive of Dubai Creek and City Centre Deira.  This hotel is 9.9 mi (16 km) from Gold Souk and 11.6 mi (18.7 km) from Dubai World Trade Centre.","attractions":"Distances are displayed to the nearest 0.1 mile and kilometer.
